violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The walk-in freezer, and mop sink was observed out of order and in poor repair. Equipment must be in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener, and ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was moved to 3-bay sink, and ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
The mop sink was observed not working and out of order. Mop sink must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain test strips or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Milk was observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to freezer to chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (onions) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

Eggs, pureed meats and deli meat were observed held at 42 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
Dishwasher was not in good repair, observed leak from bottom pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
Scoop located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, observed to be torn and scratched. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
